description: Counts vehicles grouped by registration status and vehicle type. Use when user asks fleet composition by status, or how status differs across vehicle types.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY registration_status = KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword, vehicle_type = KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 50
